productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Olive Jacket
description: CompositionOlive green sleeveless puffer jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck with a full zippered front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and an appliquéd brand patch on top and aggressive stitch detailingFitRegularWash careWash similar colours togetherMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeDesigned to brave the elements, this padded jacket from US Polo is a high performance piece. Sharply and slickly designed with a structured silhouette, you'll look in-style even on off-weather days. Wear this with denims, casual shoes and a form fitting tee. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
